footer.tagline: Ride on your terms. Negotiate fares directly with drivers in 700+ cities worldwide.

home.hero_subtitle: inDrive lets riders propose a price and drivers accept, counter, or decline. No surge pricing. No algorithm. Just a fair deal between two people.
home.hero_image_alt: inDrive rider and driver shaking hands
home.how_subtitle: Three steps to a ride that works for everyone.
home.how_step1_body: Enter your destination and propose a fare you think is fair. No hidden fees, no surge multipliers.
home.how_step2_body: Nearby drivers see your offer and can accept, counter with a different price, or pass. You stay in control.
home.how_step3_body: Review driver ratings, vehicle details, and the agreed fare before confirming. Ride with confidence.
home.features_subtitle: Every feature is designed to give riders and drivers more control, more transparency, and more value.
home.feature1_body: Propose any price you want. Drivers respond in real time. The market sets the rate, not an algorithm.
home.feature2_body: Rain, rush hour, or a big event — your fare stays predictable. We never multiply prices during peak demand.
home.feature3_body: Every driver passes a background check and vehicle inspection. Ratings are public and unfiltered.
home.feature4_body: Share your trip live with trusted contacts, access an SOS button, and review your route before you go.
home.feature5_body: Economy, comfort, or delivery — choose the service that fits your trip and your budget.
home.feature6_body: Pay however you prefer. inDrive accepts cash, cards, and in-app wallets with no extra fees.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Millions of riders trust inDrive every day. Here is what a few of them have to say.
home.t1_quote: I saved almost 30% on my daily commute just by proposing a fair price. The driver was happy, I was happy. That is how it should work.
home.t2_quote: Finally a ride app that does not punish you for needing a ride when it rains. The price I set is the price I pay.
home.t3_quote: I love being able to see driver ratings before I confirm. It makes me feel so much safer, especially late at night.
home.t1_image_alt: Maria S. rider from São Paulo
home.driver_subtitle: Set your own rates, accept only the rides you want, and keep more of every fare. No weekly quotas, no penalties.
home.cta_subtitle: Download inDrive and take control of how you get around.

about.cta_subtitle: Join thousands earning on their own terms.
about.hero_subtitle: Connecting riders and drivers through transparency and trust.
about.origin_body_1: Founded on the belief that fair pricing and direct connections empower both riders and drivers, inDrive revolutionized ridesharing by letting passengers and drivers negotiate fares in real time.
about.origin_body_2: Today, we operate in over 40 countries, serving millions of users who value control, affordability, and community.
about.origin_image_caption: inDrive's global community of drivers and riders
about.pull_quote: We believe in putting power back in the hands of drivers and riders—not algorithms.
about.team_subtitle: Diverse talent united by a mission to reshape mobility.
about.values_subtitle: Transparency, fairness, and community at our core.
